LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN, BALWATSINH THAKOR, KIRANSINH THAKOR AND LATABAN THAKOR'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. OVERRULED. LIBERALLY CONSTRUED, THE ELDER ABUSE AND DISABILITY DISCRIMINATION CLAIMS ARE ADEQUATELY ALLEGED. DEFENDANTS TO FILE RESPONSIVE PLEADING BY 5/18/12. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN, BALWATSINH THAKOR, KIRANSINH THAKOR AND LATABAN THAKOR'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED. GRANTED AS TO THE AMOUNT DEMANDED AS DAMAGES AND DENIED AS TO THE REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. PLAINTIFFS SEEK TO RECOVER PERSONAL INJURY DAMAGES AT PARAGRAPH 47 OF THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT AND THAT PARAGRAPH IS INCORPORATED INTO EVERY OTHER CAUSE OF ACTION ALLEGED. PLAINTIFFS HAVE PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT THEIR REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. THE MOTION TO STRIKE "$3,000 FOR EACH ACT OF RETALIATORY EVICTION" AT PARAGRAPH 119, PAGE 20, LINE 11, IS GRANTED AND REPLACED BY $2,000 FOR EACH ACT OF RETALIATORY EVICTION". ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Colin H. Jewell, Esq., from Cholakian & associates, 650-871-9544, for defendant and moving party
Mark Hooshmand, Esq., from Hooshmand Law Group, 415-318-5709, for plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN, BALWATSINH THAKOR, KIRANSINH THAKOR AND LATABAN THAKOR'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overruled. Liberally construed, the elder abuse and disability discrimination claims are adequately alleged. Defendants to file responsive pleading by 5/18/12. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Colin H. Jewell, Esq., from Cholakian & associates, 650-871-9544, for defendant and moving party
Mark Hooshmand, Esq., from Hooshmand Law Group, 415-318-5709, for plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified.
DEFENDANTS SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN, BALWATSINH THAKOR, KIRANSINH THAKOR AND LATABAN THAKOR'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Granted as to the amount demanded as damages and denied as to the request for punitive damages. Plaintiffs seek to recover personal injury damages at paragraph 47 of the Second Amended Complaint and that paragraph is incorporated into every other cause of action alleged. Plaintiffs have pled sufficient facts to support their request for punitive damages. The motion to strike "$3,000 for each act of retaliatory eviction" at paragraph 119, page 20, line 11, is granted and replaced by $2,000 for each act of retaliatory eviction". Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2012 Continued To May-25-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Colin H. Jewell, Esq., of Cholakian & Associates, Tel. 650.871.9544, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Christopher R. Boldig, Esq., of the Hooshmand Law Group, Tel. 415.318.5709, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. The court modified its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS KIRANSINH THAKOR, SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN, BALWANTSINH THAKOR, and LATABAN THAKOR'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend as to the 10th, 11th, 4th causes of action and the class allegations, sustained without leave to amend as to the 14th cause of action and overruled as to all other claims. Order signed. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353
